_help.modelFile: Model file used for loading/saving trained NLP model.
_help.serverPort: HTTP port used by server.js in API mode.
_help.activeProfile: Default profile when request/CLI does not provide one.
_help.profiles: Named behavior sets; each profile inherits missing values from profiles.default.

profileOptions.threshold: Confidence cutoff to accept predicted intent.
profileOptions.fallbackIntent: Intent returned when score is below threshold.
profileOptions.normalizeInput: If true, normalize Arabic text before classify/train.
profileOptions.includeConfidence: If true, API includes meta details (score/profile/threshold).
